nodes.name: 南里奥格兰德州
nodes.summary: 南里奥格兰德州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联89种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Long-trained nightjar等89种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐

nodes.name: Russet-winged spadebill
nodes.summary: Russet-winged spadebill（Russet-winged spadebill，学名 Platyrinchus leucoryphus），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: There is extensive and continuing loss and degradation of Atlantic forest throughout its range, through forest clearing and selective logging, which therefore constitute serious threats to this species." It is found in many protected areas in Brazil and in at least one in each of Paraguay and Argentina
